summary: Review code changes with structured per-dimension analysis, severity labels, and traceability checks.

scripts.purpose: Collect changed files, classify by risk category, and list candidate npm checks to run.
Safely extract commits, file stats, changed file list, and optional full diff against a target branch.
Classify changed files by review area, risk level, review order, and suggested scrutiny checks.

signals: verdict (APPROVE / REQUEST CHANGES / COMMENT) appears at top of review.md
traceability gaps are reported when agent memory is present
skipped files are listed with reasons
